content:
AI is changing how teams build. Hiring loops are more selective. Companies are looking for engineers who can do more than solve the prompt in front of them.

They want engineers who can reason clearly, communicate tradeoffs, design systems, use AI thoughtfully, and explain the impact of their work.

Formation helps software engineers build the skills that matter now. You’ll work with mentors, practice with peers, and get structured support around the roles you’re targeting.

If you’re preparing for your next move, don’t wait until interviews are on the calendar.

Apply to Formation: https://fm.dev/4xTyEjh
comment: The shift I’m seeing is that strong engineers now need judgment more than just technical output. Knowing when to trust AI, question it, and communicate decisions may become the bigger differentiator.
